commit.message:
feat: Odontonet - Sistema completo de gestao odontologica

Sistema de gestao para clinica Dr. Diego Costa com:

Admin (dados reais via Supabase):
- Dashboard com metricas em tempo real
- Gestao de pacientes (CRUD completo)
- Agenda semanal e diaria com workflow de status
- Sala de espera + painel TV para pacientes
- Prontuario digital (odontograma, periograma, evolucoes, documentos)
- Catalogo de procedimentos
- Financeiro (receitas, despesas, orcamentos com CRUD, comissoes)
- Relatorios (producao, agendamentos, financeiro, pacientes)
- Controle de acesso por role no sidebar
- Configuracoes da clinica

Portal do Paciente (dados reais):
- Dashboard com consultas, tratamento, financeiro, notificacoes
- Agendamentos com confirmacao/cancelamento
- Prontuario com odontograma readOnly
- Financeiro com parcelas e recibos
- Mensagens com chat em tempo real
- Notificacoes com acoes

Site Institucional:
- Home, Sobre, Servicos, Equipe, Contato
- Agendamento online (salva no banco)
- Politica de privacidade (LGPD)

Stack: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, shadcn/ui

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: major agent hardening — protection, market coverage, reliability

- Watchdog: trailing stops, profit ladder, 1h momentum alerts (30s cycle)
- Dynamic market: top 150 Solana ecosystem tokens via CoinGecko category API
- Retired prices.js from all server routes — unified on solana-market.js cache
- Executor: gas check, USDC balance pre-flight, price impact guard, dynamic mint resolution
- Watchdog health alert: Discord notification after 5 consecutive failures
- Trade signal: /events endpoint + dashboard 5s poll for immediate post-trade refresh
- Entry prices, peak value, trailing stops all persisted across restarts
- CoinGecko API key support (x-cg-demo-api-key) across all 3 callers
- Fixed 429 backoff bug: backoff now set before stale-cache check
- Reasoning interval: 900s → 600s; MAX_TRADE_USD default: 50 → 35
- Discord notifications replace Telegram
- Mandate system: minMarketCapUsd filter replaces allowedAssets whitelist
- Wallet: dynamic SPL token discovery (no hardcoded mint list)
- Dashboard: live wallet reflection, market box tracks held tokens only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

arch: separate protocol and marketplace into independent layers

- cmd/node: pure protocol binary (identity, credit, settlement, verification, reputation, economics)
- cmd/marketplace: application binary that connects to protocol via SDK
- Protocol API serves only primitive endpoints
- Marketplace proxies protocol endpoints + adds task/escrow/routing/explorer
- docker-compose.yml: two-service deployment (protocol + marketplace)
- Dockerfile: combined binary with --marketplace flag for backward compatibility
- Marketplace uses same SDK as any third-party builder
- Third parties can deploy protocol node without marketplace code
- No behavior changes — all existing functionality preserved

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(batch-fetch): call fetchers directly instead of via HTTP

The batch-fetch-traders dispatcher was making HTTP requests to sub-routes,
which consistently failed due to:
1. Vercel Deployment Protection blocking VERCEL_URL requests (401)
2. Cloudflare 100s proxy timeout killing NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL requests (524)

Result: ZERO successful batch fetches in 7+ days. All group A-F platforms
served by the batch dispatcher had stale data (97-139h old).

Fix: Import and call fetcher functions directly in-process, eliminating
the HTTP round-trip entirely. Also includes proxy fallback improvements
for binance-futures/spot and okx-futures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- oak.yaml: move Gutenberg-H (4.2 GB) from zim-p2 to P3 deferred
- content/guides/manifest.md: update ZIM table with new P1 split and sizes
- content/guides/index.md: update M-tier bullet (Simple Wikipedia + practical refs)
- Targets: M ~10 GB, L ~29 GB (within 16/32 GB budgets)

commit.message:
Fix toast animation: use setTimeout instead of rAF for visibility

Chrome throttles requestAnimationFrame in background/inactive tabs,
preventing the mw-toast--visible class from being added. Switch to
setTimeout(16ms) which fires reliably in all tab states.

Fix 500 on generate: wrap all view logic in try/except + compact nutrition prompt

- KeyError on ai_result['program_name'] and ai_result['days'] was outside the
  try/except, causing unhandled 500. Now the entire program creation block is
  wrapped and returns a user-friendly error instead.
- Use .get() with defaults for all AI result keys
- Nutrition prompt now strictly limited: 4 meals, 1 note/meal, 2 fasting reasons,
  2 top-level notes, max 15 words per string — cuts output by ~60%

fix: call Stripe Connect before marking onboarding complete

The order was wrong — marking first_login_completed=true and clearing
onboarding_step BEFORE calling Stripe, so when Stripe failed the barber
was stuck (marked complete but never connected). Now Stripe is called
first; onboarding is only marked complete on success.
